Mario

Mario is a fictional character in the Mario video game franchise, created by Nintendo. He is the main protagonist and is often depicted as a plumber who goes on adventures to rescue Princess Peach from the villain Bowser.

Mario is known for his red hat, blue overalls, and mustache. He has appeared in numerous games, including the Super Mario series, Mario Kart, and many others. He is one of the most iconic and recognizable video game characters in history.
